rulings.Case Title: ROBERT RUHL et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Deft B.R. Funsten & Company And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, March 24, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel and request for sanctions was continued from March 16 on the court¿s own motion to give the parties an opportunity to engage in further meet and confer efforts. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4pm today the parties, without any argument, must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org specifying what issues remain in dispute and, as to any such issues so specified, a hearing is required. =(220/HEK)
